## Summary

Describe the reusable workflow change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran `npm run validate`.
- [ ] Each changed skill has valid `name` and `description` frontmatter.
- [ ] Large reference material stays outside `SKILL.md`.
- [ ] I added no secrets, credentials, machine-specific paths, or temporary files.
- [ ] If this changes `prefer-mazey`, the canonical Mazey source was updated first and synchronized.
